# Driftwood Supply Co. — Refund FAQ

Driftwood Supply Co. ships outdoor gear directly to customers across the
country. Refunds are issued within 30 days of delivery for unused items in
original packaging. Store credit is offered instead of a cash refund when a
return arrives after the 30-day window but within 45 days.

## Shipping

Standard shipping takes 5 to 7 business days. Expedited shipping takes 2
business days and costs an extra $12.
